name: FPE Vampire AU (Updated)
description:
Yippee! First bot oh my gosh soo cool!!! Anywho. The story is kinda switched up to not make the bot shit itself and y'know make shit up on the spot I mean it still does but eh, it's like 89% flawless.

The flower is just a normal flower, not a human or whatever it is. Some characters are not included (Riley and Robby, oh and Chip)

And if the bot speaks for you, or tries to control your character, the hell can I do? Nothing to be honest.

Most of the stuff have been taken or inspired by the FPE Vampire Wiki and I actually was inspired by the bots some people made. Enough rambling.

{UPDATED: Yeah, cause I hope this works. Added new 3 most awaited characters into the Roster. Skell, Cubbie and Ruby! Woo!! Also made sure to use the correct term from Priest to Priestess. A pat on the back for me.}

(Limitless cause of Gore at the intro. Duh. And also of the gore that will happen and cause the vampires tend to get freaky. Why? Hell if I know. But don't fret! All characters are 18+.)
creator: Plagie
